title: Realistic Lily Pads
description: Adds 5 size variations, deep roots, and randomly rotated connecting smaller pads and water lillies.
body:
![overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/o4EWCnS9/images/a1d05602afb275f31c796a5badf8ad0d40f6f6e3.png)

A small vanilla plus pack for more realistic lily pads. Adds the five versions from minecraft dungeons, gives them long roots, and chance to spawn a large or small water lily in either white or pink, which is more common, or orange, purple, or yellow, which is less common. With polytone the lily pads have biome dependant colors.

Requires polytone for custom biome colors
